idea_title: Ensemble Uncertainty Estimation Combining SAM and ATTA

selected_idea.title: Ensemble Uncertainty Estimation Combining SAM and ATTA
selected_idea.pitch: EV001 and EV010 both highlight domain shift as critical issue. We combine SAM and ATTA for robust uncertainty estimation.
selected_idea.mechanism: Implement ensemble uncertainty estimation by averaging uncertainty scores from SAM and ATTA before pseudo-label selection.
selected_idea.testable_hypothesis: If we combine SAM and ATTA, ECE will reduce by 25% compared to using either method alone on breast_cancer dataset.

label: MVP Experiment
hypothesis: If we combine SAM and ATTA, ECE will reduce by 25% compared to using either method alone on breast_cancer dataset.
method: Implement ensemble uncertainty estimation by averaging uncertainty scores from SAM and ATTA before pseudo-label selection.
expected_result: The proposed method (Ensemble Uncertainty Estimation Combining SAM and ATTA) should beat the baseline on the specified metric.
failure_interpretation: A weak or negative margin means the mechanism does not justify promotion and should be revised or killed.
